meta.title: Akut de akuma ku j톖l ya t톝팯n yen칢 k칛콂 t톖팯톖팯u th칦n

hero.title: Akut de akuma ku j톖l ya t톝팯n yen칢 k칛콂 t톖팯톖팯u th칦n
hero.lead: IATF ee k칛 ye k톖c ku톖ny b칦k l톖팯톖팯m ya looi n칢 k톖c k톖팯k nh칦칦m, ku b칦 kek ya kueen apath, ku b칦k kek ya muk apath.
support: Apam k칢n칢 ee k칛 ye kek gam lueel, ku t톝팯 ye k칛 t톖팯톖팯u th칦n muk th칦n, ku ye k칢 ye k칢 t톖팯u ke k톖c t톖팯 n칢 톢칛n k톖팯k yiic looi n칢 k칢 c칦 kek gam.

header.title: Lu톖팯톖팯i 칢 lu톖i, k톖c t톖팯 th칦n, pu톖팯l 칢 lu톖i

cards.title: Mission fit
paragraphs: IATF ee lu톖i ye gam n칢 k칢 de k칢 ye c톖l칢 'accessibility barrier' ku n톖콂 k칢 pu톖th ap톝i t칢n칢 k톖c 칢b칢n.
Ajui톝톝r adhil b칦 ya piath t칢n톖콂 lu톖톖i de raan 칢 rot ku b칦 ya luui ke ye k칢 t톖팯 n칢 k톖c k톖팯k yiic.
N칢 k칢 de k칛 ye kek y칬k n칢 w톝bthait yic, ke IATF aye luui n칢 [W3C WAI](https://www.w3.org/WAI/) K칛 c칦 kek ya y칬k n칢 k톖c c칦 lu톖톖iden ya lu톖팯톖팯i, aye nyu톖톖th 칢yad톝팯 l톖nad톝팯 ke ke ye lu톖팯i apath.

cards.title: Acceptance 칢 project
paragraphs: Ajui톝톝r al칢u b칦 ya gam t칢 cen칢 yen ya t칦콂 ke:
items: yen ee k칢 w칦c k톖c b칦k l톖 th칦n y칬k
K칢 c칦 b톝팯n ya lueel ee yic ap톝i ku ka l칢u b칦 raan ya tak.
K칛 ye kek looi aye k칛 l칢u b칦 kek ya looi.
lu톖i ee r톖t mat keke lu톖i de IATF
an톖콂 t톝팯 l칢u b칦 yen rot lu톖톖i th칦n b칦 yen ya c톖팯kpiny ka b칦 ya th칬l

cards.title: 쿲톖팯톖팯r de k칛 t톖팯u th칦n
paragraphs: K칛 ye kek gam aye kek cak n칢 t톝팯n de akutnhom de IATF GitHub.
K칛 ye t톖팯톖팯u th칦n aye t톖팯 th칦n agon칢 lu톖톖i eb톝팯n ya muk apath, agut c칦 t톝팯 b칦 k톖c c칦 kek ya guiir r칬t waar th칦n.

cards.title: G톝팯톝팯r 칢 l톖팯톖팯m
paragraphs: IATF projects use copyleft licensing unless a project states otherwise:

maintainer.title: Raan c칦 lu칬i ku raan muk lu톖i
paragraphs: Ajui톝톝r eb칢n c칦 gam adhil raan c칦 g칛tpiny ya kuanyc칬k b칦 ya raan c칦 lu칬i. Raan k칢n칢 al칢u b칦 ya l톖팯톖팯m ku b칦 k톖c k톖팯k b톝팯n kony ku b칦:
items: b칦 k칛 c칦 kek gam ya t칦콂 ku j톖l ya k칛 ye kek y톖팯톖팯k b칦 kek b톝팯n ya kuanyc칬k
looi k칢 b칦 k톖c k톖팯k deet yic
maintainer.footnote: K칛n ee lu톖i de t톝팯n de k칛 t톖팯톖팯u th칦n. Lu톖i de akutnhom ee r칢칢r kek칢 akutnhom de IATF. Lu톖idi톝팯 칢t칢n칢 ee lu톖톖i de ku톖톖ny, ku j톖l ya t톝팯 ye k톖c r칬t ku톖ny th칦n  ku acie t톝팯톝팯u de k칢 t톖팯u kek칢 k톖c k톖팯k, t톝팯 c칦 kek r칬t mat th칦n, ka t톝팯 b칦 kek luui th칦n.

publicDevelopment.title: Lu톖팯톖팯i 칢 k톖c
paragraphs: K칛 c칦 kek ya looi n칢 IATF yiic aye kek ya guiir n칢 k톖c k톖팯k yiic.
publicDevelopment.footnote: Pi톖팯톖팯c de k칛 thiekic ac칦칦 dhil ya t톖팯 n칢 k톖c k톖팯k yiic n칢 chat ka inboxes yiic.

header.title: K칛 c칦 g톖팯톖팯r 칢 k톖c k톖팯k

paragraphs: IATF ee luui n칢 k톖c k톖팯k yiic n칢 t칛n cen칢 yen t톖팯톖팯u th칦n.

A public request record isn't necessarily the original message. IATF may summarize, redact, or restructure a request before publication so the accessibility need can be reviewed without exposing unnecessary personal information. Y칦콂 de k칢 k톖톖r n칢 k톖c k톖팯k acie w톝팯t th톝톝r.
Public request records can be stored in the IATF GitHub organization, on this website, or both.
Th톝톝r ke k칢c kek g톖팯t, IATF ee w칢l k톖팯k c칦칦 kek k톖톖r nyaai, c칦m칢n de w톝팯톝팯r de raan, ku j톖l ya t톝팯n yen칢 raan rot lu톖톖i th칦n, agut c칦 t톝팯 b칦 kek ya g톖팯톖팯r th칦n.

Discord aye lu톖팯톖팯i n칢 ajui톝톝r yic. IATF acie jam de Discord t톖팯u n칢 ath칬칬r yic n칢 th톝톝r k톖팯k yiic, ku w톝팯t c칦 kek ya t톖팯c aye mac n칢 Discord. L칬칬콂 c칦 kek b톝팯n looi n칢 ye Discord yic adhil kek ya mat n칢 k칛 c칦 kek g톖팯t yiic n칢 GitHub.

Aci g톖팯톖팯r de k칢 w칦c n칢 ku칢n de search engine yic t톝팯 l칢u ben칢 ye lu톖톖i th칦n. Public aye lueel ke ye k칢 l칢u b칦 keek ya t칦콂 ku b칦 kek ya l톝팯k k톖c. Aci w톝팯t ye c톖l 'optimised for discovery through name searches' ye lueel.

IATF al칢u b칦 k칛 c칦 g톖팯톖팯r b톝팯n ya t톖팯c ku ka b칦 ke nyaai n칢 톢칛n ke k톖c yiic, ku ka c칦칦 l칢u b칦 k톖c k톖팯k ya nyaai n칢 b톝팯톝팯i peei yiic c칦m칢n de cache, notifications, forks, screenshots, search engines, Discord, or other external systems.
Na ye w톝팯t w칦c b칦 ya k칢de yet칬k, ke du톖팯kk칢 ye tu톖팯톖팯c n칢 IATF public channels.

chair.lead: Akutnhom de akutnhom ee akutnhom de aku톖팯tnh칦칦m de IATF muk.K칢n칢 ee wu톖팯톖팯c t칢n칢 lu톖i de raan de thurumbil 칢 lu톖i: akutnhom 칢 akutnhom ab톝팯n, ku acie akuma de akuma t칬k 칢b톝팯n.

duties.title: K칢 ye k톖팯톖팯c looi
items: G칢l l톖팯톖팯콂 de raan t톖팯 n칢 akutnhom de IATF GitHub
Aci g톖팯톖팯r piny n칢 w톝팯t de gam de lu톖톖i ku j톖l ya w칢l c칦 kek b톝팯n kuanyc칬k ago kek ya t톖팯 n칢 ath칬칬r yic
Lu톖팯톖팯i ke ye raan ye k톖c ku톖ny n칢 lu톖톖i de IATF
duties.footnote: Raan t톖팯u akutnhom yic ac칦칦 IATF b톝팯톝팯i t칢n칢 k톖c k톖팯k, lu톖i c칦 ri톖p, awel칢 k칛 ye kek gam n칢 t톝팯n yen칢 kek luui th칦n, ku ac칦칦 l칬칬콂 ke k톖c t톖팯 n칢 aku톖팯tnh칦칦m t톖팯톖팯u yiic n칢 k칢 de ku톖톖ny de t칢 yen칢 kek lu톖톖i th칦n.

election.title: Ye kuany 칢 ru톖팯톖팯n
paragraphs: Akutnhom aye kuany t칬k n칢 ru톖팯톖팯n yic. Akutnh칦칦m aye kuany n칢 p톝i karou tue콂 n칢 p톝톝i de thi톝팯톝팯r (December) yic, ku k칛 c칦 kek b톝팯n y칬k aye kek lueel n칢 pen칢dhorou 15, ku akutnhom yam ee rot j톖톖k n칢 p톝in칦n t칬k (January).
K톖c c칦 pu톖팯톖팯c b칦k ya kuany aye k톖c c칦 luui n칢 IATF yic n칢 ru칬n t칬k yic ku c칦 raan t칬k ya ku톖팯c pu톖팯u n칢 ye ru칬n k칢n칢 yic.
L톖팯톖팯i ee rot looi ke ye w톝팯t 칢 k톖c kedhi톝 n칢 GitHub n칢 t톝팯톝팯u de l칬칬콂 ke IATF, n칢 ye m톝n, ke k톖c c칦 k톖톖r, ku j톖l ya k칢 c칦 b톝팯n th칦n aye kek ab톝팯k de k칛 c칦 kek g톖팯t yiic.

continuity.title: Lu톖팯톖팯i c칦 rot looi
paragraphs: Na c칦n athook c칦 looi n칢 ru톖팯톖팯n t칬k yic, ke raan t톖팯 n칢 ye thaa k칢n칢 ab칦 r칢칢r n칢 ye lu톖톖i k칢n칢 yic agut t톝팯 b칦 amat d톝팯t b톝팯n.
B톝팯ny al칢u b칦 l톖팯톖팯콂de b톝팯n pu톖팯l n칢 thaar d톝팯t yic.

chair.footnote: Akutnhom de akutnhom ac칦 b톝팯n looi n칢 ru칬칬n de 2026 ago akutnhom de aku톖팯tnh칦칦m ya mac apath.

states.title: W톝팯t c칦 g칛tpiny
paragraphs: K칛 ye kek looi aye k칛 thiin lik ye kek lueel n칢 k톖c yiic:
items: A le콂 raan b칦 ye muk
states.footnote: L칬칬콂 k칛k칢 aaye k칛 c칦 kek g톖팯톖팯r looi b칦k r칬t lac deet yiic.

reassignment.title: L톖팯톖팯i ku j톖l ya k칛 t톖팯 n칢 ath칬칬r yic
paragraphs: Na c칦 raan t톖팯 n칢 lu톖톖i b톝팯n pu톖팯l ka c칦칦 lui, ke akut de IATF al칢u b칦 raan d톝팯t ya g칛m lu톖i, b칦 l톖팯톖팯m de lu톖톖i ya c톖k l톖팯콂, ka b칦 lu톖톖i ya th칬l.
Ajui톝톝r al칢u b칦 ya t톖팯톖팯u t칢 c칦 yen w칦c th톝톝r b톝팯n th칬l, ku j톖l ya t톝팯 c칦 k톖c k톖팯k pu톖팯l b칦 kek ya luui th칦n, ka t톝팯n c칦칦 k톖c b칦 ya l톖팯k luui th칦n.
reassignment.footnote: K칛 c칦 kek ya t톖팯톖팯u n칢 k칛 c칦 kek g톖팯t yiic, aye kek ya t칦콂 n칢 k톖c k톖팯k yiic, agut t톝팯 b칦 yen ya yic ap톝i.

items: gam 칢 w칢l c칦 kek gam
Ku톖톖ny 칢 run ju톝팯톝팯c 칢 lu톖i eb톝팯n칢
